source: Standard Encounter.pdf (Character Law & Campaign Law p.134)
_metadata.reason: Standard encounter procedure and chart were supplied, along with the C&T II location/environment encounter charts. Creature counts, level ranges, and reactions remain unspecified where the source tables do not provide them.
included_sections: Character Law & Campaign Law 3.3.5 Standard Encounter Chart and modifiers
C&T II 16.1 Water Source Encounter Charts
C&T II 16.1 Special Features Encounter Charts
selected weekly event encounter hooks from GM Law
missing_sources: Local bestiary.json for exact bestiary_match verification
notes: bestiary_match left null unless exact verification against the project bestiary is available
C&T II encounter charts do not specify number appearing, level range, or reaction

global.notes_en: When the group is circulating in a settlement or on the move anywhere, check every 4 hours. If stationary, roll once for every static period of 12 hours or less.
global.notes_fr: Lorsque le groupe circule dans une agglomeration ou se deplace ou que ce soit, effectuez un test toutes les 4 heures. S'il est immobile, faites un jet une fois par periode statique de 12 heures ou moins.

method.avoidance_roll: PC group makes a modified open-ended avoidance roll
method.activity_roll: GM makes a modified open-ended activity roll
method.comparison: If activity exceeds avoidance, consult the Standard Encounter Chart; otherwise no encounter chart is used.
method.notes_en: The Standard Encounter Chart itself is not present in the uploaded GM Law PDFs.
method.notes_fr: La table standard des rencontres elle-meme n'est pas presente dans les PDFs de GM Law fournis.

codes.t: trap or ambush or surprise attack

standard_encounter_chart.notes_en: Codes before the slash are for social beings; codes after the slash are for wild beasts. If both sides contain a code, reroll to choose low=wild beasts, high=social beings.
standard_encounter_chart.notes_fr: Les codes avant la barre concernent les etres sociaux ; ceux apres la barre concernent les betes sauvages. Si les deux categories ont un code, relancez : bas = betes, haut = etres sociaux.

encounter_check.notes_en: See global encounter procedure and Standard Encounter Chart differential method.
encounter_check.notes_fr: Voir la procedure globale de rencontre et la methode differentielle de la table standard des rencontres.

special_encounters.description_en: The immediate area is under attack by bandits and rogues; 2d10 bandits are present.
special_encounters.description_fr: La zone immediate est attaquee par des bandits et des voyous ; 2d10 bandits sont presents.

special_encounters.description_en: The character discovers a bandit camp in the wilderness.
special_encounters.description_fr: Le personnage decouvre un camp de bandits dans la nature.
special_encounters.notes: Strength and composition left to GM.

special_encounters.description_en: A local lord sponsors a public contest of strength, combat ability, or an art.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un seigneur local organise un concours public de force, de combat ou d'un art.

special_encounters.description_en: The character is the victim of or witnesses a crime and may assist in the aftermath.
special_encounters.description_fr: Le personnage est victime d'un crime ou en est temoin et peut etre amene a intervenir.

special_encounters.description_en: A local NPC challenges the character to a duel.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un PNJ local defie le personnage en duel.

special_encounters.description_en: A common person asks the character for help.
special_encounters.description_fr: Une personne du commun demande de l'aide au personnage.

special_encounters.description_en: A haunting occurs; details depend on the monthly event key.
special_encounters.description_fr: Une hantise survient ; les details dependent de la cle des evenements mensuels.

special_encounters.description_en: Roll d100: 01-20 minor disease strikes the character; 21-100 a major disease strikes an NPC friend.
special_encounters.description_fr: Lancez d100 : 01-20 une maladie mineure frappe le personnage ; 21-100 une maladie majeure frappe un PNJ ami.

special_encounters.description_en: The character has accidentally insulted an NPC who seeks satisfaction.
special_encounters.description_fr: Le personnage a insulte par inadvertance un PNJ qui exigera reparation.

special_encounters.description_en: A local lord invites the character to an event.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un seigneur local invite le personnage a un evenement.

special_encounters.description_en: Roll d100: 01-40 a kidnapping attempt targets the character; 41-100 an NPC friend is kidnapped.
special_encounters.description_fr: Lancez d100 : 01-40 une tentative d'enlevement vise le personnage ; 41-100 un PNJ ami est enleve.

special_encounters.description_en: Land is sighted; it may be an uncharted island, coastline, or chain of islands.
special_encounters.description_fr: Une terre est apercue ; il peut s'agir d'une ile inconnue, d'un littoral ou d'un archipel.

special_encounters.description_en: The area is under attack by a monster; determine the exact nature on the Universal Monsters encounter table.
special_encounters.description_fr: La zone est attaquee par un monstre ; determinez sa nature exacte sur la table Universelle des Monstres.

special_encounters.description_en: A strange or supernatural event occurs nearby and may require investigation.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un evenement etrange ou surnaturel se produit a proximite et peut necessiter une enquete.

special_encounters.description_en: A small group of nobles crosses the character's path.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un petit groupe de nobles croise la route du personnage.

special_encounters.description_en: Roll d100: 01-50 one pirate ship approaches; 51-75 two pirate ships approach; 76-100 one or two suspicious ships approach.
special_encounters.description_fr: Lancez d100 : 01-50 un navire pirate approche ; 51-75 deux navires pirates approchent ; 76-100 un ou deux navires suspects approchent.

special_encounters.description_en: The character stumbles on information about a plot against a friendly NPC.
special_encounters.description_fr: Le personnage tombe sur des informations concernant un complot contre un PNJ ami.

special_encounters.description_en: The character discovers ruins: 1 temple/shrine; 2-6 residence; 7-9 tower/fortification; 10 castle/keep. Then roll d100 plus type modifier to see whether they are inhabited.
special_encounters.description_fr: Le personnage decouvre des ruines : 1 temple/autel ; 2-6 residence ; 7-9 tour/fortification ; 10 chateau/donjon. Puis lancez d100 plus le modificateur du type pour voir si elles sont habitees.

special_encounters.description_en: A small shrine to a local deity is found; offerings may grant a benefit, offense may provoke a curse.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un petit sanctuaire dedie a une divinite locale est trouve ; une offrande peut apporter un bienfait, une offense peut provoquer une malediction.

special_encounters.description_en: An opportunity for a special profession-appropriate mission appears.
special_encounters.description_fr: Une opportunite de mission speciale adaptee a la profession apparait.

special_encounters.description_en: An unknown NPC shows unusual interest. d10 origins: 1-3 ordinary traveller, 4 cult member, 5 secret police official, 6 assassin, 7 disguised nobleman, 8 rogue, 9 bandit, 10 disguised creature.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un PNJ inconnu manifeste un interet inhabituel. Origines sur d10 : 1-3 voyageur ordinaire, 4 membre d'un culte, 5 agent de la police secrete, 6 assassin, 7 noble deguise, 8 voyou, 9 bandit, 10 creature deguisee.

special_encounters.description_en: A traveller with no special interest in the character wants to accompany them briefly.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un voyageur sans interet particulier pour le personnage souhaite l'accompagner un moment.

special_encounters.description_en: A noble or important official visits the area openly.
special_encounters.description_fr: Un noble ou un dignitaire important visite ouvertement la zone.

environmental_hazards.effect_en: The wind dies completely for 10d10 hours; ships must row to move.
environmental_hazards.effect_fr: Le vent tombe completement pendant 10d10 heures ; les navires doivent ramer pour avancer.

environmental_hazards.effect_en: A fire breaks out in the building the character is in.
environmental_hazards.effect_fr: Un incendie se declare dans le batiment ou se trouve le personnage.

environmental_hazards.effect_en: A fierce storm strikes; treat as a gale using the weather rules.
environmental_hazards.effect_fr: Une violente tempete eclate ; traitez-la comme un coup de vent selon les regles meteorologiques.
